## ✅ Checklist

- [ ] `bun run lint` passes with no errors.
- [ ] I tested my changes locally in the browser.
- [ ] The change is accessible (semantic HTML, keyboard-navigable, ARIA where needed).
- [ ] The change is responsive (tested at mobile + desktop widths).
- [ ] I updated documentation / README where relevant.
- [ ] I used existing shadcn/ui components instead of building new ones.
- [ ] I did **not** use indigo or blue as a primary color.
- [ ] My commits follow [Conventional Commits](https://www.conventionalcommits.org/).

## 🧩 Type of change

- [ ] 🐛 Bug fix (non-breaking)
- [ ] ✨ New feature (non-breaking)
- [ ] 💥 Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to change)
- [ ] 📝 Prompt addition
- [ ] 📚 Documentation only
- [ ] 🎨 UI/UX improvement
- [ ] ♻️ Refactor (no functional change)
